positive: A stylized, repeating pattern featuring interconnected constellations and bioluminescent flora elements. The design utilizes clean, bold black line work against a rich, deep indigo and midnight blue color palette. Composition is highly symmetrical and centered, creating a hypnotic, seamless medallion pattern suitable for textiles. Emphasize strong silhouettes and high contrast. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau engraving and modern celestial map illustration. Lighting should be ethereal, as if lit only by starlight, highlighting the intricate details of the vine and star elements. Vector illustration quality, highly detailed, commercial artwork.
negative: blur, low quality, text, words, watermarks, artifacts, grain, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, grayscale, messy, photorealistic, gradient sky, signature, logo
